name: liquid-blobs
title: Liquid Blobs
author: Parable
description: A gooey metaball hero backdrop: soft radial blobs drift on slow sine orbits and lean gently toward the pointer, fusing like liquid where they overlap via the SVG gooey-filter trick (a wide feGaussianBlur plus an alpha-contrast feColorMatrix). A single rAF loop writes GPU-only translate/scale, the blur radius tracks the container so the goo reads the same at any size, and an IntersectionObserver idles it off-screen; under prefers-reduced-motion the blobs settle into a static, still-merged arrangement with no drift.

inspiredBy.name: Cult UI — Hero gradient / metaball backgrounds (pattern)
